The Opening Ceremony of the Paris Olympics promises to be a grandiose event. It will be the first time it hasnГўВҖВҷt been held in a stadium. Instead, planners have spent months organizing a performance on the river Seine.

Other innovations for Paris 24 include a Champions Park that will allow fans the chance to meet athletes and watch the action on a big screen at the foot of the Eiffel Tower.

CGTNГўВҖВҷs Dan Williams talked with Delphine Moulin who is the Paris 2024 Director of Celebrations about the ceremony.

For more, check out our exclusive content onCGTN Nowand subscribe to our weekly newsletter,The China Report.
